assertions.title: /api/calls returns call data

steps.expected: JSON array of Call objects with all fields, status 200

assertions.issues: API returns 500 error. Google Sheets API authentication or access issue persists.

assertions.title: Empty sheet response

steps.expected: Empty JSON array [] with status 200 when sheet is empty
steps.observed: Same 500 error as VAL-API-001 - cannot determine empty sheet behavior

assertions.issues: Cannot test empty sheet response due to Sheets API connection failure. Same blocker as VAL-API-001.

steps.action: GET /api/calls when Sheets API is unreachable
steps.expected: Structured error response with appropriate status code
steps.observed: Returns { error: 'Failed to fetch calls' } with status 500

evidence.note: Error handling is working as expected - returns proper JSON error object with 500 status

assertions.title: /api/calls/stats returns aggregated stats

steps.expected: JSON object with totalCalls, answeredCount, voicemailCount, qualifiedLeads, averageDuration, callsPerDay, status 200

assertions.issues: Stats endpoint also returns 500 error due to Google Sheets API connection failure.

blockers.description: Google Sheets API is returning errors on both /api/calls and /api/calls/stats endpoints. Both endpoints return 500 status with error messages. This appears to be the same authentication/access issue as the prior validation run. Credentials are present in .env.local but the API connection is failing.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified API endpoints are accessible (not 404 or connection refused). Server is responding but returning 500 errors from the Google Sheets service layer.

summary: Tested 4 assertions: 1 passed (VAL-API-003 error handling works), 3 blocked (VAL-API-001, VAL-API-002, VAL-API-004) due to Google Sheets API failure returning 500 errors on all data endpoints.
